curation_notes: Patch modifies only one source file (cnl_blueprint.py) in the addcrypted function. The advisory explicitly names the file and endpoint. The fix adds os.path.normpath and a startswith check to ensure the constructed DLC file path stays within the intended storage directory. Sibling blueprints (json_blueprint.py, api_blueprint.py, app_blueprint.py) were checked — json_blueprint.py uses secure_filename for its file path construction and is not vulnerable. Pre-assigned class path-traversal (CWE-22) is correct.
